name: bookhaven-monorepo
description: Root-level management for BookHaven MERN stack

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: npx concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.start: npx concurrently "npm run start --prefix server" "npm run build --prefix client && npm run preview --prefix client"
